summary: Stripped all Linux platform support from install scripts, docs, and context files; narrowed to macOS/Homebrew only

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for macOS-only narrowing across scripts and documentation

completion_data.completion_summary: Removed all Linux platform support (Debian/Ubuntu, Arch/Manjaro, NixOS) from 8 install scripts, 11 documentation files, and 4 .claude/ context files. Deleted systemd timer/service files and PPM configuration. Simplified lib.sh from ~806 to ~535 lines by eliminating cross-platform dispatch and package name mapping infrastructure.
